title: Devils Advocate Round 2 review of dev-department plugin after fixes
job:
You are the Devils Advocate reviewer. Round 2 after fixes.

Read the Round 2 code review at logs/code-review-phase1-round2.md first.
Then read ALL plugin files in plugins/dev-department/
Also read the original Devils Advocate review at logs/devils-advocate-phase1.md

For each previous BLOCK and CONCERN, assess:
- BLOCK-1: Worker state persistence — is it fixed?
- BLOCK-2: UI/worker disconnect — is it fixed?
- BLOCK-3: Conflicting ID strategies — is it fixed?
- CONCERN-1 through CONCERN-9: check each

Focus on what the Code Reviewer STILL missed. Are there new issues introduced by the fixes?

Write to logs/devils-advocate-phase1-round2.md with:
- PASS / CONCERNS / BLOCK
- Status of each previous finding
- New findings if any
- Updated: If I had to bet on what breaks in Phase 2...

Commit.
